rationale: For Portugal, the main indirect concern remains energy price uncertainty tied to the Iran deal stalemate; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to daily life.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran disputes
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal uncertainty keeps global oil prices unpredictable, with mild downstream effects on Portuguese energy bills and cost of living.

top_events.title: EU migration debate: new rules and Rome protests
top_events.summary: EU-wide migration policy discussions are marginally relevant to Portugal as an Atlantic entry point, but no new rules enacted this cycle.

top_events.title: Gold price trending down
top_events.summary: Falling gold prices reflect shifting global risk sentiment; minor indirect signal for Portuguese savers and financial markets.
